title: Galactic Cup of Limmie
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}}
[[File:Limmie.jpg|thumb|300px|[[Team Coruscant]] against [[Team Fondor]] playing [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] in the opening round of the Galactic Cup.]]
The '''Galactic Cup of Limmie''', sometimes known as just the '''Galactic Cup''', was the national league for the sport of [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]]. It had many teams from throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

During the [[41 ABY]] tournament, dozens of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] packed the ''[[Oyu'baat]]'' [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] to [[Black ale/Legends|drink]] and watch the games.<ref name="Revelation">''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''</ref>
